narrative:
Harrison Township has 13,695 registered voters, with 60.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 9.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 29.9%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 20.3 percentage points.
